complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down the authentication system implementation into subtasks covering login form development, JWT token handling, session management, 2FA implementation, integration with existing authentication endpoints, and security testing
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: High complexity due to security requirements, integration with existing systems, and multiple authentication features including 2FA, session management, and JWT handling

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide the password management functionality into subtasks for password change form, password reset flow, email integration, and security testing
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Medium complexity involving security-sensitive operations, email integration, and multiple API endpoints, but more focused in scope than the main authentication system

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down the navigation implementation into component development, responsive design implementation, and integration with routing system
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Lower complexity focused on UI development with clear requirements, though responsive design and integration with existing design system add some complexity

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide the dashboard implementation into metrics cards development, activity feed implementation, chart visualizations, API integration, and performance optimization
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: High complexity due to multiple data visualizations, integration with multiple API endpoints, and performance requirements for loading within 2 seconds

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down the comments system into comment creation form, comment display component, file attachment handling, visibility control for internal comments, and threaded view implementation

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide the status management into status change control, status validation rules, status history timeline, and API integration
